description: Registry of supported inference engines and their patch capabilities provided by wings-accel.

adaptive_draft_model.description: Enable adaptive draft lengths for draft_model and eagle3 speculative decoding on vLLM 0.17.0

sparse_kv.description: Enable sparse KV cache attention (BMSA algorithm) for vLLM 0.17.0. Requires vsparse package.

parallel_spec_decode.description: Fix AscendDraftModelProposer position OOB crash when draft model max_position_embeddings is smaller than target model max_model_len (e.g. Qwen3-8B + Qwen3-0.6B). Draft only, no performance guarantee.

ears.description: Enable EARS (Entropy-Adaptive Rejection Sampling) for speculative decoding on vLLM-Ascend 0.17.0. Improves acceptance rate for mtp, eagle3, and suffix methods. Controlled by VLLM_EARS_TOLERANCE env var (default 0.0 = disabled).
